members.bio: The Secretary General leads the conference with vision and determination.
The first Deputy Secretary General supports the conference ensures smooth operations.
Similar to the first Deputy Secretary General, The Second Deputy Secretary General plays a crucial role in the conference's operations.
The first Chief of Staff coordinates between different teams and manages the secretariat's agenda.
The second Chief of Staff oversees operational excellence and strategic implementation.
Ensuring the conference runs smoothly behind the scenes with meticulous planning and execution.
Leading the digital transformation and media presence of the conference.
Directing the press team that documents and reports on conference proceedings with journalistic excellence.
